parameters.jsCode:
const account = $('Summarize Onboarding Progress1').first().json; const pitchText = $input.first().json.message?.content?.[0]?.text || $input.first().json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'You have made great progress — converting to a paid plan ensures uninterrupted access to all your work.'; const subject = `Your ${account.company_name} Trial Ends in 3 Days — Here's What You've Accomplished`; const body = `

Your Onboarding Summary

Hi ${account.company_name} team,

Your trial ends on ${account.trial_end}. Here's a quick look at your journey so far:

Milestones Completed (${account.milestones_completed}/${account.total_milestones})

${account.completed_steps}

${account.remaining_steps !== 'None' ? `

Still To Complete

${account.remaining_steps}

` : ''}

Why Upgrade Now?

${pitchText}


Convert to Paid

Reply to this email or book a 15-min call if you have questions.

`; return [{ json: { ...account, email_subject: subject, email_body: body } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const account = $('Build Trial Summary Email1').first().json; const subject = `[URGENT] Rescue Call Needed – ${account.company_name} trial ends ${account.trial_end}`; const body = `

Rescue Call Needed — Trial Expiring

Account${account.company_name}
Domain${account.domain}
Trial Ends${account.trial_end}
Completion${account.completion_pct}%
Health Score${account.health_score}/100
Completed Steps${account.completed_steps}
Missing Steps${account.remaining_steps}

Trial summary already sent. Schedule a conversion call ASAP.

`; return [{ json: { ...account, sales_subject: subject, sales_body: body } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const m = $input.first().json; const subject = `[OnboardIQ] Weekly Onboarding Report – Week ending ${m.week_ending}`; const body = `

Weekly Onboarding Report

Week Ending: ${m.week_ending}

Account Overview

New Accounts${m.total_accounts}
Converted${m.converted} (${m.conversion_rate_pct}%)
Churned${m.churned} (${m.churn_rate_pct}%)
Stalled${m.stalled}
Completed${m.completed}

Interventions

Total Sent${m.total_interventions}
Successful${m.successful_interventions}
Success Rate${m.intervention_success_rate}%

Avg Health Score: ${m.avg_health_score}/100

`; return [{ json: { ...m, analytics_subject: subject, analytics_body: body } }];
